name: myco:author-harness-task
description: Use this skill when designing, writing, configuring, or debugging a new phased executor task for the Myco agent harness — even if the user doesn't explicitly ask for a "task authoring" guide. Applies when adding a new intelligence task, modifying phase structure, tuning turn budgets or model routing, adjusting scheduling triggers or session-gating, designing a tool surface, or debugging silent phase failures or budget exhaustion. Covers: YAML task anatomy and registration; phase decomposition and the judgment/recipe gradient; model selection via the advisor pattern; turn budget calibration including local-model multipliers; scheduling triggers and session-gating; tool surface design and readOnly enforcement; Grove scope iteration patterns; per-project lifecycle management; and observability via the agent_runs audit table.
